resume_summary: Architect with 10+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable, cloud-native applications using Java, Spring Boot, and Angular. Proven expertise in microservices architecture, event-driven systems, and enterprise modernization, including decomposing monoliths into resilient distributed systems. Experienced in leading engineering teams, driving architectural decisions, and improving system performance, reliability, and deployment efficiency. Hands-on with GCP, AWS, and Azure, with strong focus on CI/CD, Kubernetes, and observability. Google Certified GCP Architect with a track record of delivering high-impact solutions in banking, logistics, and enterprise domains.
